ddls:
CREATE TABLE "businesses" (
  "business_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the business */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the business */,
  "address" TEXT /* Street address of the business */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the business is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the business is located */,
  "postal_code" TEXT /* Postal code of the business */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude coordinate of the business location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude coordinate of the business location */,
  "stars" REAL /* Average star rating of the business */,
  "review_count" INTEGER /* Total number of reviews for the business */,
  "is_open" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the business is currently open (1) or closed (0) */,
  "attributes" TEXT /* JSON object containing various business attributes (e.g., accepts credit cards, wheelchair accessible) */,
  "categories" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of business categories (e.g., restaurants, doctors) */,
  "hours" TEXT /* JSON object containing the business hours for each day of the week */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the business */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the business */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the business */,
  "owner_id" TEXT /* ID of the business owner */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the business was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the business was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("business_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "business_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "business_category_map" (
  "business_id" TEXT /* ID of the business */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("business_id", "category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the review */,
  "business_id" TEXT /* ID of the business being reviewed */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* ID of the user who left the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (1-5 stars) */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was posted */,
  "review_title" TEXT /* Title of the review */,
  "helpful_votes" INTEGER /* Number of helpful votes for the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_business_id FOREIGN KEY ("business_id") REFERENCES businesses ("business_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., business owner, administrator, customer) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "business_owners" (
  "owner_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the business owner */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* ID of the user who is the business owner */,
  "business_id" TEXT /* ID of the business owned by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("owner_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_business_owners_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_business_owners_business_id FOREIGN KEY ("business_id") REFERENCES businesses ("business_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "business_id" TEXT /* ID of the business */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the analytics data */,
  "num_views" INTEGER /* Number of views for the business on the given date */,
  "num_reviews" INTEGER /* Number of reviews for the business on the given date */,
  "avg_rating" REAL /* Average rating of the business on the given date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("business_id", "date")
)
